name: Titan Bank, N.A.
description_short: FDIC-insured national bank offering full-featured online business banking with no monthly fees, free wires/ACH, and live customer support since 1907.
description_long:
Titan Bank, N.A. is a national bank established in 1907 that has evolved into a primarily online business banking provider. The bank is FDIC-insured and holds an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau and a 5-star rating from Bauer Financial, positioning itself as an established, regulated alternative to newer fintech startups.

Titan Bank offers comprehensive business banking services delivered entirely online, including free domestic wires (up to 25/month), unlimited free ACH transfers, mobile check deposit, free debit cards, QuickBooks integration, and access to 37,000+ Moneypass ATMs nationwide. Account setup is completed online in most cases the same day of application, with no minimum opening balance required. The platform supports unlimited multi-user access with granular permission controls and allows customers to view multiple company accounts from a single login.

The bank differentiates itself through live customer support—customers reach actual bankers rather than automated systems—and a transparent fee structure with no monthly charges for accounts maintaining $500+ combined balances. They market themselves as a preferred SBA lender and emphasize personalized service combined with enterprise-level banking tools traditionally available only to larger companies.

While the website content is highly positive with customer testimonials, the company's strengths are concentrated in business banking rather than retail consumer banking. The lack of detailed information about deposit rates, lending products beyond SBA loans, and specific interest rates means consumers should verify current terms directly. The $500 minimum balance requirement to avoid monthly fees, while low, does represent a condition that distinguishes it from some truly free checking accounts. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Business checking accounts with online account opening
Free domestic wire transfers (up to 25 per month)
Multi-user account access with permission controls
Access to 37,000+ Moneypass ATMs for fee-free withdrawals
Multiple account viewing from single login
Live customer support via phone and video chat
pros: No monthly maintenance fees with $500+ combined balance minimum
Genuinely live customer support with fully empowered bankers, not automated systems
Free domestic wires (up to 25/month) and unlimited free ACH transfers
Same-day online account opening available in all 50 states with $0 minimum opening balance
Free mobile check deposit and access to 37,000+ Moneypass ATMs nationwide
Free QuickBooks integration and initial business checks
Multi-user account management with customizable permission levels and subsidiary account viewing
cons: $500 combined balance requirement to avoid monthly fees creates ongoing cost if balance drops
Primarily focused on business banking; limited information about consumer/personal banking products
Website lacks specifics on deposit rates, loan terms, and APYs for different account types
No mention of mobile app features or detailed online security specifications
Limited transparency about SBA loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements

contact.address: 1701 E Hubbard St, Mineral Wells, TX 76067

best_for: Small business owners needing online-only banking with live customer support
Companies with multiple subsidiaries or affiliates requiring consolidated account management
Businesses seeking SBA loans with faster approval and closing processes
Companies wanting fee-free domestic wire transfers and ACH capabilities
diagnosis: Titan Bank is best suited for small business owners and entrepreneurs who value online-only banking with genuine live support and no wire transfer fees. The main caveat is that this is a business-focused bank with limited retail consumer products, so individual consumers should verify whether personal checking/savings offerings meet their needs before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1701 E Hubbard St, Mineral Wells, TX 76067
